title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. jaceoides
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. jaceoides, also known as the Jurassic Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various ways, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
